items.summary: Rewrite the `adminReset` function in `backend/main.mo` so that authorization is based solely on the passcode string. If the caller provides the correct passcode '161189', the function must clear all registered users, all chat messages, and all timetable entries and return a success result. Remove any principal-based or role-based authorization check that currently causes the function to return 'only authorized admins can reset' even when the correct passcode is supplied.
